name: Ben Thoars
text: Very hard to review. The artist is 5 star at his skill. But he did not care about my health and he ripped me off on the price. I had to go to hospital because he did not care about my health. But his skill as an artist is some of the best I have seen. He needs to treat people like patients not customers.

name: Анастасия Никитина
text: If you've ever considered something like this, or want to keep something important as a keepsake, or experience traditional tattooing in this country, then this is the place for you! A wonderful artist: she'll explain everything, help you choose, and do everything super professionally! The best salon in Siem Reap! 💯

name: Javier Robaina
text: I feel completely ripped off. Prices are higher than in any other European country. Look for another place and negotiate the price before they start the procedure.
